description_long: This is a tall, round wooden stool with a smooth, circular seat and three slightly splayed cylindrical legs. The legs are connected by two horizontal rungs, which provide structural support and serve as footrests. The wood has a rich, dark brown finish, giving the stool a classic and sturdy appearance. The surface of the seat is flat and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist design. There are no visible decorative elements or upholstery, and the construction appears solid and functional. The stool is designed for seating in public or urban environments such as bars, cafes, or waiting areas.
description: A tall, round wooden stool with three legs and two horizontal rungs, finished in dark brown wood with a minimalist, sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat, three legs, and two horizontal rungs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the seat and legs visible, showing the alignment of the rungs from a different angle.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to the front, with the seat and rungs visible but legs slightly offset.
description_view_3: Side view with the seat and legs visible, showing the cylindrical shape and rung placement.
